name: It’s Nothing Without Sazón:
method: Just like the Adobo from Scratch, Sazón is normally used in a lot of Puerto Rican dishes. It has a strong taste of annatto seeds, which also help bring color to a lot of dishes. I like to make Sazón from scratch because it doesn’t include additives. You can visit your local spice shop to pick up the spices organically and individually.

In a small bowl, combine the garlic powder, cumin, turmeric, coriander, annatto, oregano and parsley. Store it in an airtight container or a glass container with a tight-fitting lid. It will keep on the shelf for at least 1 month or in the refrigerator for 3 months.
